case_title: ESTIFANOS GIRMA WOLDE RESPONDENT VS. WILLIAM HUN DAWOOD APPELLANT

docket_entries.description: RECORD ON APPEAL JUDGEMENT FILED BY APPELLANT DAWOOD, WILLIAM HUN AS TO RESPONDENT WOLDE, ESTIFANOS GIRMA HEARING SET FOR JAN-22-2004 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 525
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF HEARING ON APPEAL
MINUTES FOR JAN-22-2004 9:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
JUDGE PRO TEM JOHN N. GULICK, JR.; CLERK JUN P. PANELO; ALL PARTIES APPEARED REPRESENTED BY THEIR RESPECTIVE COUNSEL. JUDGMENT WAS RENDERED IN FAVOR OF RESPONDENT, ESTIFANOS GIRMA WOLDE.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT WOLDE, ESTIFANOS GIRMA RECOVER FROM APPELLANT DAWOOD, WILLIAM HUN $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $143.83 INTEREST, $47.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,340.83, SEE SCANNED DOC
